text.title: User Control and Freedom Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: control audit of /settings/account (delete account, irreversible) + /cart/item (delete item, reversible).

example.title: delete-account (irreversible)
example.p: reversibility=irreversible; undo_available=false; cancel_available=true; exit_mechanism=[x-button, escape-key, click-outside]; recovery_method="support contact within 30 days"; severity=0; fix_direction="OK".

example.title: delete-cart-item (routine reversible)
example.p: Before: confirmation dialog "Are you sure?" — severity=1 (confirmation-fatigue on routine).

After: replace with toast-undo (5s); undo_available=true; cancel_available=n/a; exit_mechanism=[x-button, click-outside]; recovery_method=toast-undo; severity=0; fix_direction="Replace confirmation with toast-undo."

example.title: focus_trap_verified
example.p: Playwright spec verifies Escape + outside-click + back-button across modals. focus_trap_verified=true.
